subcodes.first_line: O thou who utterest the praise of God! If thou shouldst speak, speak of communion with Him. If thou shouldst seek, seek His peerless Beauty
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بثنای الهی اگر بگوای از راز و نیاز او گوی و اگر بجوای جمال بی انباز او
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @absolute freedom; independence of God, @love of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
